lines.english: Why will the police have a difficult time?
lines.chinese: 警察为什么会遇到困难？
lines.raw: Why will the police have a difficult time? | 警察为什么会遇到困难？

lines.english: The Greenwood Boys are a group of pop singers.
lines.chinese: “格林伍德少年”是一个流行歌手组合。
lines.raw: The Greenwood Boys are a group of pop singers. | “格林伍德少年”是一个流行歌手组合。

lines.english: At present, they are visiting all parts of the country.
lines.chinese: 目前，他们正在全国各地巡回演出。
lines.raw: At present, they are visiting all parts of the country. | 目前，他们正在全国各地巡回演出。

lines.english: They will be arriving here tomorrow.
lines.raw: They will be arriving here tomorrow. | 他们明天将抵达这里。

lines.english: They will be coming by train and most of the young people in the town will be meeting them at the station.
lines.chinese: 他们将乘火车来，镇上的大部分年轻人会去车站迎接他们。
lines.raw: They will be coming by train and most of the young people in the town will be meeting them at the station. | 他们将乘火车来，镇上的大部分年轻人会去车站迎接他们。

lines.english: Tomorrow evening they will be singing at the Workers' Club.
lines.chinese: 明天晚上，他们将在工人俱乐部演唱。
lines.raw: Tomorrow evening they will be singing at the Workers' Club. | 明天晚上，他们将在工人俱乐部演唱。

lines.english: The Greenwood Boys will be staying for five days.
lines.raw: The Greenwood Boys will be staying for five days. | “格林伍德少年”将停留5天。

lines.english: During this time, they will give five performances.
lines.chinese: 在此期间，他们将演出5场。
lines.raw: During this time, they will give five performances. | 在此期间，他们将演出5场。

lines.english: As usual, the police will have a difficult time.
lines.chinese: 和往常一样，警察将遇到很多麻烦。
lines.raw: As usual, the police will have a difficult time. | 和往常一样，警察将遇到很多麻烦。

lines.english: They will be trying to keep order.
lines.raw: They will be trying to keep order. | 他们将尽力维持秩序。

lines.english: It is always the same on these occasions.
lines.chinese: 每逢这种场合，情况总是如此。
lines.raw: It is always the same on these occasions. | 每逢这种场合，情况总是如此。
